data.title: Update project docs to reflect environment portability changes
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new portability mechanisms (shim self-detection, command wrappers, portability lint).
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate documentation about how to set up and use DSO in different environments.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md quick reference and architecture sections; update WORKTREE-GUIDE.md with portable path examples; document check-portability.sh in relevant docs; document command wrapper mechanism and marketplace detection
- OUT: Creating new documentation files — updates to existing docs only

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the shim resolution order including the self-detection fallback
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy
- When this story is complete, existing documentation no longer contains hardcoded /Users/joeoakhart paths except where annotated with # portability-ok
  ← Satisfies: SC4 (portability of documentation)
- When this story is complete, the command wrapper mechanism and its marketplace-first priority behavior are documented

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions
